---
title: "GIS Portfolio"
---

Highlighting spatial analysis and geological mapping projects.

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Appalachian Knickpoint Analysis](images/knickpoint_map.png)

![Stream Network Modeling](images/stream_analysis.png)
:::

### Project Highlights
* [cite_start]**Knickpoint Clustering:** Visualizing geological anomalies across the Appalachian range using large-scale raster datasets[cite: 21, 25].
* [cite_start]**PyCogs:** Python-driven vector geometry and stream analysis[cite: 27, 28].
